bootSplash.title: AI for Talent
bootSplash.subtitle: Preparing the talent workspace, restoring the local interface, and loading the first scene.

tauri.shortDescription: AI-powered talent matching and conversation workflows in a desktop app.
tauri.longDescription: AI for Talent packages the existing Vue and Vite experience as a fast Tauri desktop app for talent matching, candidate dialogue simulation, and intelligent summary workflows.
